description_long: This is a dark blue and black Chevrolet SUV marked as a state police vehicle, featuring a robust, boxy build typical of law enforcement SUVs. The exterior is adorned with gold 'STATE POLICE' lettering on the front doors and rear, and a gold police badge emblem on the rear side panels. The roof is equipped with a prominent light bar containing blue and red emergency lights, as well as additional equipment such as antennas and a roof rack. The windows are tinted, and the vehicle has standard silver hubcaps and black side mirrors. The rear of the vehicle displays further police markings and a red tail light, while the front grille is silver with a Chevrolet emblem.
description: A dark blue and black Chevrolet SUV police car with gold 'STATE POLICE' markings, a roof-mounted light bar, and police insignia. It features tinted windows, silver hubcaps, and visible emergency equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the silver grille, Chevrolet emblem, windshield, and part of the roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'STATE POLICE' gold text on the front door, gold badge on the rear panel, and the full length of the vehicle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying 'STATE POLICE' text, rear lights, and the roof equipment including antennas and light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view with 'STATE POLICE' text and badge, showing the vehicle's profile and emergency equipment on the roof.
attribute_police_markings: Gold 'STATE POLICE' text is present on both front doors and the rear of the vehicle. A gold police badge emblem is visible on the rear side panels. The markings are in a bold, sans-serif font and are clearly legible against the dark paint.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with blue and red lights is present, positioned centrally on the roof. Additional smaller lights may be integrated into the light bar assembly.
attribute_police_insignia: A gold police badge emblem is visible on the rear side panels of the vehicle.
